was an invitation only half-day workshop for sponsors and researchers in the iCyPhy Research Center (Industrial Cyber-Physical Systems) at UC Berkeley. The goal of the workshop was to explore synergies across projects. The workshop was be

synergies across projects. The workshop was being held the same day as the BEARS Symposium . Program Location: 540 A/B Cory Hall, UC Berkeley, Berkeley, CA 94720 Time: 1-5 PM. Contact Update Help Copyright © UC Regents; all rights reserved.
